# Foil

> Foil is a Pokémon TCG deal-finder for collectors. It shows the best current price on any specific Pokémon card from live eBay listings, the real 30-day sold average from aggregated sales data, and sends a free email alert when a card you're tracking drops to your target price.

Foil is buyer-side: tell it a card you want, and it finds the best live listing across the marketplace, shows what the card actually sells for (never an estimate — every figure is a real number), and lets you set a price-drop alert with no account required. Sold-price data comes from aggregated eBay and TCGplayer sales; live listings come from the eBay Browse API. Built by a Level-4 TCGplayer seller.

## Start here

- [Home](https://foiltcg.com/): what Foil does and how to start tracking a card.
- [Start a watchlist](https://foiltcg.com/start): add the cards you're chasing and get a price-drop alert. No account needed.
- [Best buys this week](https://foiltcg.com/deals): market movers — cards trading below their recent sold average, computed from sold-price momentum.
- [Pricing methodology](https://foiltcg.com/pricing-methodology): how the buy signal and sold-average figures are computed.

## Guides

- [How much is my Pokémon card worth](https://foiltcg.com/pokemon-card-value-calculator): a value calculator + a 60-second checklist.
- [Pokémon card condition guide](https://foiltcg.com/pokemon-card-condition-guide): NM vs LP vs MP and why grade drives price.
- [Japanese Pokémon cards value](https://foiltcg.com/japanese-pokemon-cards-value): reading and pricing Japanese-language cards.
- [Blog](https://foiltcg.com/blog): guides on pricing, grading, sold-vs-market data, and buying smart.

## Browse cards

- [All cards](https://foiltcg.com/cards): the full per-card price index.
- [Umbreon VMAX Alt Art — "Moonbreon"](https://foiltcg.com/cards/swsh7-215-umbreon-vmax-alt-art)
- [Umbreon ex — Prismatic Evolutions](https://foiltcg.com/cards/sv8pt5-161-umbreon-ex)
- [Charizard — Base Set](https://foiltcg.com/cards/base1-4-charizard)
- [Blastoise — Base Set](https://foiltcg.com/cards/base1-2-blastoise)
- [Pikachu ex — Surging Sparks](https://foiltcg.com/cards/sv8-219-pikachu-ex)
